mapper.select: SELECT * FROM programs ORDER BY display_order ASC
SELECT * FROM programs WHERE is_visible = TRUE ORDER BY display_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO programs (title, description, icon_url, google_play_url, app_store_url, display_order, is_visible) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{iconUrl}, #{googlePlayUrl}, #{appStoreUrl}, #{displayOrder}, #{isVisible})
mapper.update: UPDATE programs SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, icon_url = #{iconUrl}, google_play_url = #{googlePlayUrl}, app_store_url = #{appStoreUrl}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, is_visible = #{isVisible} WHERE id = #{id}
